title: What Scarcity and Abundance Are
body:
Scarcity means demand outstrips supply. Abundance means supply is large enough that access broadens and prices or effort fall.

The topic is about the consequences of those conditions for behaviour and policy.
keyPoints: Distribution is often the real issue
furtherReading: Abhijit Banerjee and Esther Duflo, 'Poor Economics'
Peter Zeihan, 'The End of the World Is Just the Beginning'
